name: Set up a SIG | openEuler
description: Learn how to establish a SIG within openEuler. Follow our guide to start your own SIG and drive innovation in key technology areas.

name: How to Set Up a SIG in openEuler
description: Learn how to establish a SIG within openEuler. Follow our guide to start your own SIG and drive innovation in key technology areas.

step.name: Submit application
step.text: Submit a SIG creation PR to the openEuler/community repository with basic SIG information and objectives.

step.name: Technical Committee review
step.text: The openEuler Technical Committee (TC) reviews the SIG application, evaluating its technical direction and community value.

step.name: Build the team
step.text: After approval, form the initial SIG team and appoint Maintainers and Committers.

step.name: Start operations
step.text: The SIG officially launches, beginning regular meetings, code contributions, and release management.
